title: HidePlayerList
description: HidePlayerList allows you to disable the ability for people to see what players are online on your server.
body:
HidePlayerList allows you to disable the ability for people to see what players are online on your server.

![Server List with blocked player information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d96f09328b50050bb1b29f32a8c632ab719a517.png)

```yaml
hide-message: Player list has been disabled
```

[ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) is required for the plugin to function
